task_completion.description: Select the four duplicate email server outage requests from the request list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes next to the tickets submitted by Sarah Johnson, Mike Chen, Lisa Rodriguez, and David Thompson are checked in the request list view.

task_completion.description: Open the merge requests dialog or page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Merge Requests' modal, popup, or dedicated page is visible on the screen, listing the selected tickets.

task_completion.description: Designate Sarah Johnson's ticket as the parent request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the merge dialog, the ticket with the subject 'Email server completely down - cannot send or receive' (by Sarah Johnson) is explicitly selected as the 'Parent' (e.g., via a selected radio button or parent dropdown).

task_completion.description: Verify the other three tickets are set to be merged as children.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the merge dialog, the tickets from Mike Chen, Lisa Rodriguez, and David Thompson are listed as the child requests that will be merged into the parent.

A success notification indicating the requests were merged, OR the request list view showing the child tickets as 'Merged'/removed while the parent remains, OR the parent ticket's details page showing the child tickets under a 'Merged' or 'Linked Requests' section.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface of the ticketing system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser interface of the ticketing system (ServiceDesk Plus or similar) being navigated, rather than terminal windows executing API curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual ticketing application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to a functional web application with proper styling, menus, and URLs, not a local text editor or mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the merge success.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open and being used to alter the DOM text to simulate a successful merge.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Parent ticket to be selected: 'Email server completely down - cannot send or receive' (Requester: Sarah Johnson). Child tickets to be merged into the parent: 'Outlook keeps showing disconnected from server since 7 AM' (Requester: Mike Chen), 'Unable to access email since this morning - urgent' (Requester: Lisa Rodriguez), and 'Exchange server error - email not working for entire Sales team' (Requester: David Thompson).
